title: Wessel (disambiguation)
content:
'''Wessel''' was the surname of more than one person.

*[[Marcellin Wessel]], [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed the planet of [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]]
*[[Redd Wessel]], Marcellin's son and a [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]

'''Also'''
*[[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]], [[Clawdite/Legends|Clawdite]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and associate of [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

{{Disambig}}
